support_policies.shipping_policy: May ship preloaded in official self-hosted and desktop releases.
support_policies.diagnostics_expectation: Included in standard connector diagnostics and maintainer triage.
support_policies.update_expectations: Updated alongside core releases when official behavior changes.
support_policies.maintainer_support: Maintainers support packaging, compatibility, and regression issues.

support_policies.shipping_policy: Not shipped by default; may be documented or operator-approved explicitly.
support_policies.diagnostics_expectation: Diagnostics stay visible, but community ownership remains explicit.
support_policies.update_expectations: Best-effort updates; release cadence is independent from core releases.
support_policies.maintainer_support: Best-effort guidance only. Plugin authors/operators own plugin behavior.

support_policies.shipping_policy: Never implicitly shipped or endorsed in official curated bundles.
support_policies.diagnostics_expectation: Diagnostics include trust warnings and explicit operator review boundaries.
support_policies.update_expectations: No release guarantees. Operators must validate updates themselves.
support_policies.maintainer_support: Unsupported beyond core platform defect reports.

support_policies.shipping_policy: Never shipped by the project; local path/operator managed only.
support_policies.diagnostics_expectation: Diagnostics stay local-first and highlight non-distributed ownership.
support_policies.maintainer_support: No maintainer support for plugin implementation or packaging.

bundles.description: Current official DE-first receipt connector bundle shared by self-hosted and desktop.

profiles.description: Neutral default that avoids implying regional endorsement in universal releases.
out_of_scope_notes: Community packs require explicit trust labeling and opt-in.

profiles.description: Curated starter profile for German-speaking operators. Current official coverage is DE-first.
out_of_scope_notes: Austria and Switzerland official connector expansion remains future work.
Desktop offer/deal parity is intentionally out of scope.

profiles.description: Shell-first profile for future US rollout without implying current official US connector coverage.
out_of_scope_notes: No official US receipt connectors ship in Sprint 9.
Hosted backend and desktop offer/deal work remain deferred.

release_variants.description: Docker-first OSS image ships one universal artifact. Market profiles only drive curated defaults and metadata.
Default signed desktop shell with current official built-ins plus optional imported receipt packs.
Regional desktop preset that preselects the DACH starter profile without changing plugin architecture.
Preview desktop preset for future US rollout. It does not imply official US connector coverage in Sprint 9.
